title: Cheaper Cosmetic Templates
description: This datapack/mod makes Cosmetic Smithing Templates cheaper to craft.  This does NOT apply to the Netherite Upgrade template.
body:
Ever thought duplication trims is ridiculosuly expensive, especially for something that's purely cosmetic?  Well, this datpack/mod is for you!  This makes all Cosmetic Smithing templates MUCH cheaper to craft, with each one only requiring 1 diamond instead of 7!   

Please note that this does NOT apply to the Netherite Upgrade Template!
